title: Front Office Manager - Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies!
